title: Not having Markdown support is a huge downside as a developer!!

posts.author: hgrayconglobal (Heather Gray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday.com is very difficult to seamlessly transition to as a developer because importing documents is a bit of a nightmare.

Markdown support is a BASIC necessity for managing documents as a developer. Markdown should be supported anywhere that long text is accepted! But especially in documents, descriptions and updates!
